# Amber Hooijmans

> Freelance video editor based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. 20+ years of experience editing commercials, short films, music videos, documentaries and online content for Dutch and international productions.

## About

Amber Hooijmans is a professional video editor active in film production since 2002 and working as a full-time editor since 2007. She is based in Amsterdam and works with productions across the Netherlands and internationally.

She is known for a strong sense of rhythm and timing, bringing a musical quality to every edit. She works fast and precisely, always searching for the emotional core of the story.

Amber maintains her own edit suite in Amsterdam and a portable setup for location work.

## Skills & Specialties

- Video editing (offline and online)
- Commercials
- Music videos
- Short films and fiction
- Documentaries
- Online content
- Dance films
- AI-assisted post production

## Tools

- Adobe Premiere Pro
- Final Cut Pro
- DaVinci Resolve
- After Effects

## Selected Credits

Work includes productions for: Amazon Prime, KWF, Scotch & Soda, Lapierre Bikes, Caña Rum Bar, Chocomel, and many others. Collaborations with directors including Andreas Pasvantis, Jacobine van Hellemond, Aaron van Valen, Insane, and Adinda Veldhuis.

## Availability

Currently available for new projects.

Dutch (native), English (fluent)
